title: Samagra ID (MP)
description: Samagra ID is the most important 9-digit (individual) or 8-digit (family) ID for all Madhya Pradesh government services. It is mandatory for linking Aadhaar and accessing any state scheme.
what_to_ask_user: Ask the user to provide their 9-digit Samagra Member ID for individual services or the 8-digit Family ID for family-based benefits.

title: Ladli Behna Yojana (MP)
description: A flagship MP government scheme providing monthly financial assistance to women aged 21-60. Key requirements include MP domicile, non-income tax payer status, and active e-KYC.
what_to_ask_user: Note that e-KYC must be completed on the Samagra portal and the bank account must be Aadhaar-linked (DBT enabled).

title: Sambal Card (MP)
description: The Sambal Yojana (Jan Kalyan Sambal) provides support to unorganized workers in MP for maternity, education, health, and funeral expenses. A valid Samagra ID is required for application.
what_to_ask_user: Remind the user that the Sambal card must be renewed and verified by local authorities to stay active.

title: MP Domicile (Sthanyi Niwas)
description: MP Resident Certificate is required for local job reservations and education quotas in Madhya Pradesh. In MP, a digital certificate is preferred, and the Tehsildar is the issuing authority.
what_to_ask_user: Check if the user has a digitally signed certificate from the MP e-District portal, as old manual ones may be rejected.

title: Madhya Pradesh Income Certificate
description: Required for scholarships and EWS benefits. In MP, income certificates are often issued based on self-declaration and are valid for 3 years for specific MP-only schemes.
what_to_ask_user: For most MP schemes, a self-declaration of income is sufficient if the family has a valid Samagra ID.

title: Ladli Laxmi Yojana (MP)
description: Educational and financial security scheme for girl children born in MP after 2006. Provides staggered payments and a final maturity amount at age 21.
what_to_ask_user: Ensure the girl child is registered within one year of birth for maximum benefits.

title: Voter ID (EPIC - MP)
description: MP election identification proof. Mandatory for casting votes in State and National elections. Form 6 is used for new MP voters, and Form 8 for address changes within the state.
what_to_ask_user: Ask the user to check their name in the MP electoral roll via the NVSP portal or Voter Helpline app.

title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.
what_to_ask_user: Make sure the mobile number linked to Samagra is active to receive the procurement SMS (Message).

title: Kanya Vivah Yojana (MP)
description: Financial aid for the marriage of daughters from poor, widowed, or divorced families in Madhya Pradesh.
what_to_ask_user: Documents including Samagra ID, BPL card, and age proof (18+ for bride, 21+ for groom) are required.

title: LPG Gas (Ujjwala/General)
description: Subsidized gas connection rules. Under MP Government rules, Ladli Behna beneficiaries often get additional cylinder subsidies (approx ₹450 per refill).
what_to_ask_user: Ask the user to check if their LPG connection is linked with their Samagra ID for the MP Gas Subsidy.

title: Caste Certificate (MP)
description: Caste certificates in MP are issued by the Sub-Divisional Officer. Non-Creamy Layer status for OBCs must be updated every 3 years (MP Specific rule).
what_to_ask_user: Remind users that caste certificates issued by MP are valid only within the state unless specified as a Central Government format.

title: Birth Registration (MP Window)
description: Registration of birth/death is mandatory within 21 days in MP. Beyond 21 days, a late fee and additional verification from a magistrate/SDO are required.
what_to_ask_user: Always try to register birth at the hospital or local municipality/gram panchayat within the first 3 weeks.

title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.
what_to_ask_user: Inform the user that their mobile number must be linked to Aadhaar for any online MP government service.

title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.
what_to_ask_user: Check that the name on the PAN card matches the name on Aadhaar and Samagra exactly.

title: MP Ration Card (NFSA)
description: MP Food Security (NFSA) eligible households get 'Khadya Parchi' (e-ration slip). Selection is based on 25+ categories including labor, caste, and special needs.
what_to_ask_user: Verify that all family members are listed in the Samagra Family ID to ensure they receive their 5kg monthly grain quota.

title: Self-Declaration (MP SV-Ghoshna)
description: In Madhya Pradesh, most services no longer require an affidavit on stamp paper; a simple self-declaration (Swa-ghoshna) is legally valid for income and domicile.
what_to_ask_user: Tell the user they do not need to visit a court for most certificates—a signed self-declaration on plain paper is enough.
